prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-AFBBRLP-BUN-3PK-500ML-CLR Product Type: HIP_FLASK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 3pk Liquor Alcohol Flask Compact Reusable Concealable Leak Proof Bladder Bag Description: Enjoy your favorite beverages on the go with the 3pk of Bladder Bag Flasks.

These Bladder Bags are great for bringing along camping, hiking, sporting events and more. Fill them up with your weapon of choice and bring your own booze just about anywhere.

Each bag is constructed of durable leak proof plastic, so no need to worry about dropping or spilling. You can even pop them in the freezer to keep your drinks cold. They are concealable, collapsible and don't contain any metal (undetectable by scanners).

Make sure to grab a few of these before your next vacation or adventure. Search Terms: hip flask stainless steel silver trekking hiking snowboarding skiing backpacking camping gear RV camp kitchen beverage tailgating ASR Outdoor whiskey water alcohol gifts wilderness adventure groomsmen boating drinking cups campfire BBQ Features: - Dimensions of Each Flask: 5" x 8.5" x 3" - Thickness: 140 Micron - Spout Diameter: 11mm - Capacity: 500mL | .5L - Durable Puncture Resistant Plastic === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-pk 500mL Clear Bladder Bag Flask

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-Pk 500mL Clear Bladder Bag Flasks

anthropic.title_differentiation: Leak Proof, Collapsible, Puncture Resistant, Freezer Safe, Metal Free, Undetectable

openai.title_differentiation: Leak Proof, Collapsible, Puncture Resistant Plastic, Freezer Safe, Metal Free, Concealable For Travel
